monthly.cta_text: Real-time data with ECMWF seasonal corrections · updated daily
monthly.opinion_tpl: {verdict_word} conditions in {month} ({score}/10). Consider {best_month} if your dates are flexible.
monthly.compare_intro_tpl: The best month is {best_month} (score {best_score}/10). Difference:
monthly.context_excellent: This is the best month of the year for {name}.
monthly.context_good: This is a good time to visit {name}.
monthly.context_poor: This is not the best time for {name}.
monthly.tropical_note: In tropical areas, rain often comes as short, intense showers rather than grey days.
monthly.src_text_tpl: Data based on 10 years of ERA5 records via Open-Meteo, with ECMWF seasonal adjustment. In {month}, {name} averages {tmax}°C, {rain}% rainy days and {sun}h of sunshine per day. Overall weather score: {score}/10. This page is automatically generated from climate data. Learn more →
monthly.bk_cta_tpl: Find places to stay in {nom} in {month}
monthly.tension_tough: Tough month — know before you go

narratives.tropical_rainy: In {month}, {name} is in the middle of the rainy season ({rain}% rainy days). Tropical showers are usually short but intense — pack a light raincoat.
narratives.tropical_dry: {month} falls in the dry season in {name}. With only {rain}% rainy days and {sun}h of sunshine, it's an optimal time to visit.
narratives.tropical_transition: {month} marks a transitional period in {name}. Weather remains pleasant at {tmax}°C with intermittent showers ({rain}% of days).
narratives.hot_dry: Temperatures reach {tmax}°C in {name} in {month}. With {sun}h of sunshine and very little rain ({rain}%), it's ideal for beach activities.
narratives.hot_humid: The thermometer hits {tmax}°C in {name} in {month}, with notable humidity ({rain}% rainy days). Favour activities early morning or late afternoon.
narratives.warm_dry: {month} offers pleasant conditions in {name}: {tmax}°C, {sun}h of sunshine and little rain ({rain}%). Perfect for outdoor activities.
narratives.warm_mixed: In {month}, {name} sees {tmax}°C with decent sunshine ({sun}h). Rain stays moderate ({rain}% of days) — have a backup plan for grey days.
narratives.mild_dry: {month} is a shoulder season in {name}. At {tmax}°C with little rain ({rain}%), it's pleasant for city breaks and sightseeing.
narratives.mild_mixed: In {month}, {name} sees changeable conditions: {tmax}°C, {rain}% rain and {sun}h of sunshine. A waterproof jacket will be useful.
narratives.cold_dry: {month} is cold in {name} ({tmax}°C max) but relatively dry ({rain}% rain). Limited sunshine ({sun}h) makes this period less attractive for outdoor activities.
narratives.cold_wet: In {month}, {name} combines cold ({tmax}°C) and rain ({rain}% of days). With {sun}h of sunshine, it's the least favourable time of year.
narratives.shoulder_good: The shoulder season is a good compromise in {name} in {month}. Fewer tourists, lower prices, and decent weather ({tmax}°C, {rain}% rain).
narratives.winter_good: Winter in {name} in {month} can offer pleasant surprises with {tmax}°C and {sun}h of sunshine. Prices are at their lowest — perfect for a cultural break.
narratives.extreme_heat: Warning: temperatures exceed {tmax}°C in {name} in {month}. The heat can be hard to bear, especially midday. Stay hydrated and limit physical effort.
narratives.monsoon: {month} is full monsoon season in {name}. Expect torrential rain ({rain}% rainy days). Some tourist infrastructure may be closed.
narratives.perfect: {month} is the ideal month to visit {name}. With {tmax}°C, {sun}h of sunshine and only {rain}% rain, all conditions are perfect.
narratives.ski_good: Good skiing conditions in {name} in {month}: {tmax}°C daytime temperatures favour a solid snowpack. {sun}h of sunshine on the slopes.
narratives.ski_fair: Skiing is possible in {name} in {month}, but conditions aren't optimal. Check piste conditions before heading out.
narratives.ski_bad: Skiing is not recommended in {month} in {name}. Temperatures ({tmax}°C) limit snow coverage.

faq_templates.good_period_q: Is {month} a good time to visit {name}?
faq_templates.good_period_a_rec: {month} is an excellent time to visit {name} (score {score}/10). With {tmax}°C, {sun}h of sunshine and {rain}% rain, conditions are very favourable.
faq_templates.good_period_a_mid: {month} is an acceptable time for {name} (score {score}/10). Conditions are decent but not optimal — consider {best_month} ({best_score}/10) if possible.
faq_templates.good_period_a_avoid: {month} is not recommended for {name} (score {score}/10). With {rain}% rainy days and {sun}h of sunshine, consider {best_month} ({best_score}/10) instead.
faq_templates.weather_q_hot: Is it too hot in {name} in {month}?
faq_templates.weather_a_hot_intense: Temperatures reach {tmax}°C. The heat is extreme — limit activities to cooler hours. Sunshine: {sun}h/day.
faq_templates.weather_a_hot_ok: Temperatures reach {tmax}°C. It's intense but manageable with sunscreen and water. Sunshine: {sun}h/day.
faq_templates.weather_q_rain: Does it rain a lot in {name} in {month}?
faq_templates.weather_a_rain_tropical: Yes, {rain}% of days see rain in {month}. In tropical areas, these are usually short but intense showers.
faq_templates.weather_a_rain_normal: Yes, {rain}% of days see rain in {month}. Plan some indoor activities as backup.
faq_templates.weather_q_cold: What's the weather like in {name} in {month}?
faq_templates.weather_a_cold: It's cool with {tmax}°C daytime and {tmin}°C at night. {sun}h of sunshine per day. Pack warm clothes and favour indoor visits.
faq_templates.weather_q_default: What's the weather like in {name} in {month}?
faq_templates.weather_a_default: In {month}, {name} sees {tmax}°C daytime, {sun}h of sunshine and {rain}% rainy days.
faq_templates.ski_a_good: Yes, {month} is an excellent time for skiing (score {ski}/10). With {tmax}°C max and {rain}% precipitation, snow conditions are good.
faq_templates.ski_a_fair: Conditions are decent (ski score {ski}/10) but not optimal. Check piste conditions before heading out.
faq_templates.ski_a_bad: Skiing is not recommended in {month} (ski score {ski}/10). Temperatures ({tmax}°C) limit snow coverage.
faq_templates.ski_a_good_mountain: Yes, {month} is excellent for skiing (score {ski}/10). With {tmax}°C max and {rain}% precipitation, snow conditions are good.
faq_templates.ski_a_fair_mountain: Conditions are decent (ski score {ski}/10) but not optimal. Check slope conditions before going.
faq_templates.ski_a_bad_mountain: Skiing is not recommended in {month} (ski score {ski}/10). Temperatures ({tmax}°C) limit snow cover.
faq_templates.mountain_summer_a_good: Yes, {month} is one of the best times to visit {name} (score {score}/10). {tmax}°C, {sun}h of sunshine — perfect for hiking.
faq_templates.mountain_summer_a_mid: Yes, {month} is a good time ({score}/10). Great for outdoor activities and hiking.
faq_templates.mountain_summer_a_transition: Transition period with a summer score of {score}/10 and ski score of {ski}/10. Neither the best ski nor summer season.
faq_templates.activity_a_outdoor: With {tmax}°C and {sun}h of sunshine, all outdoor activities are possible: hiking, sightseeing and terraces.
faq_templates.activity_a_outdoor_tropical: With {tmax}°C and {sun}h of sunshine, all outdoor activities are possible: beach, snorkelling and boat excursions.
faq_templates.activity_a_indoor: With {tmax}°C max and {sun}h of sunshine, favour indoor activities — museums, spas, gastronomy.
faq_templates.activity_a_cultural: With {tmax}°C max and {sun}h of sunshine, focus on cultural sites, museums and local gastronomy.
faq_templates.weather_q_hot2: Is it too hot in {name} in {month}?
faq_templates.pack_q: What should I pack for {name} in {month}?
faq_templates.pack_a_hot_dry: Pack light summer clothing, sunscreen (SPF 50+), sunglasses and a hat. {tmax}°C with low humidity — comfortable but stay hydrated.
faq_templates.pack_a_hot_rain: Pack light clothing and a compact umbrella or rain jacket. {tmax}°C but {rain}% rain chance — sudden showers are possible.
faq_templates.pack_a_mild: Pack layers — a light jacket for evenings ({tmin}°C), comfortable daywear for {tmax}°C days. An umbrella is useful ({rain}% rain).
faq_templates.pack_a_cold: Pack warm layers, a waterproof jacket, hat and gloves. Temperatures drop to {tmin}°C. Waterproof footwear recommended.
faq_templates.compare_q: Is {month} a good month compared to the rest of the year in {name}?
faq_templates.compare_a_best: {month} is one of {name}'s best months (score {score}/10). Conditions are excellent compared to the yearly average.
faq_templates.compare_a_good: {month} scores {score}/10 — above the yearly average. The best month is {best_month} ({best_score}/10), but {month} is a solid choice.
faq_templates.compare_a_below: {month} scores {score}/10 — below {name}'s best period. Consider {best_month} ({best_score}/10) for optimal conditions.

decision.yes_hot_beach: enjoy the sun and the beach.
decision.yes_mild_culture: enjoy city breaks and cultural visits at reduced prices.
decision.yes_cold_ambiance: enjoy the winter atmosphere and the lowest prices of the year.
decision.yes_shoulder_budget: travel off-season with good value for money.
decision.no_rain: looking for guaranteed sunshine — {rain}% rain risk.
decision.no_outdoor: looking for sunshine or outdoor activities.

validation.no_climate: [P1] {slug}: in destinations.csv but no climate data

annual_h1s:
When is the best time
to visit {nom}?
annual_descs: When is the best time to visit {nom}? See scores for all 12 months, weather breakdown and best month ranked. Based on 10 years of data.
Check the best time to visit {nom}. Full 12-month climate score, temperature, sunshine and rain. {year} guide.
{nom} climate score: {best_score}/10. See which months to go and which to avoid. Full weather ranking based on 10 years of ERA5 data.
Is {nom} worth visiting? See the full month-by-month weather score and find the best time to go. {year} climate guide.

annual_faq_mountain.q: When is the best time to visit {nom}?
annual_faq_mountain.a: It depends on the activity. For skiing: {best_ski_month} (ski score {best_ski_score}/10). For hiking/summer: {best_month} ({best_score}/10, {best_tmax}°C).

annual_faq_mountain.q: Can you ski in {nom} in winter?
annual_faq_mountain.a: Yes, it's peak ski season. Average ski score December–February: {winter_ski_avg}/10. Cold temperatures ({jan_tmax}°C max in January) and frequent snowfall.

annual_faq_mountain.q: Is it warm in {nom} in summer?
annual_faq_mountain.a: In {best_month}, temperatures average {best_tmax}°C. Ideal for hiking and outdoor activities.

annual_faq_mountain.q: What is the wettest month in {nom}?
annual_faq_mountain.a: {worst_month} is the wettest month with {worst_rain}% rainy days.

annual_faq_standard.q: What is the best time to visit {nom}?
annual_faq_standard.a: {best_month} is the best month with {best_tmax}{temp_unit} highs, {best_tmin}{temp_unit} lows, {best_sun}h of sunshine and {best_rain}% rainy days. {bests_suffix}

annual_faq_standard.q: How many hours of sunshine does {nom} get in {best_month_lc}?
annual_faq_standard.a: {nom} averages {best_sun} sunshine hours per day in {best_month_lc}. It is the sunniest month with a climate score of {best_score}/10.

annual_faq_standard.q: What is the rainiest month in {nom}?
annual_faq_standard.a: {worst_month} is the most unfavourable month with {worst_rain}% rainy days and the lowest climate score of the year.

annual_faq_standard.q: What are the temperatures at night in {nom} in {best_month_lc}?
annual_faq_standard.a: In {best_month_lc}, overnight lows reach {best_tmin}{temp_unit}, while afternoon highs average {best_tmax}{temp_unit}.
In winter (December-February), {nom} scores {winter_score}/10 on average — {winter_verdict}. The best month overall remains {best_month_lc} with a score of {best_score}/10.
{worst_month} is the most difficult month to visit {nom}, with {worst_rain}% rainy days. Climate conditions are at their lowest of the year during this period.

annual_faq_winter_verdicts.bad: Difficult period — prefer the peak season.

annual_faq_bests_suffix: The months of {bests_str} offer comparable conditions.

excellent: {month} is one of the best times to visit {nom}.
good: {month} is a good time to visit {nom} — see the full breakdown.
Good conditions in {month} for {nom}. Find out what to expect.
{nom} in {month}: worth it — check the details.
poor: {month} can be challenging in {nom} — see if it works for you.
Not the easiest month in {nom}. Find out what to expect.
{nom} in {month}: check the conditions before you book.

excellent: {month} is an excellent time to visit {nom}. {tmax}°C, {sun}h of sunshine — optimal conditions.
Visiting {nom} in {month} is a safe bet: great weather, only {rain}% chance of rain.
{nom} in {month} ticks all the boxes: warmth, sunshine, minimal rain.
good: {month} is a good time to visit {nom}. {best_month} remains slightly better (+{diff} pts).
Favourable conditions in {month} ({score}/10). {best_month} scores higher but the gap is small.
{nom} in {month}: {tmax}°C and {sun}h of sunshine. Decent, but not the peak.
fair: {month} is an average time for {nom}. {best_month} ({best_score}/10) is clearly preferable.
Not the best window: {rain}% rain risk and {sun}h of sunshine. {best_month} is much safer.
{nom} in {month} is possible but {best_month} offers a score of {best_score}/10 vs {score}.
poor: {month} is a difficult time for {nom}. {best_month} ({best_score}/10) is much more favourable.
{month} brings a challenging climate ({score}/10). {best_month} offers milder conditions if your dates are flexible.
{nom} in {month}: {rain}% rain, {sun}h of sunshine. Better to wait for {best_month}.

monthly_oui_si.high_tropical_dry_yes: you want to enjoy the dry season — ideal for beaches and excursions.
monthly_oui_si.high_tropical_dry_no: you're on a tight budget — it's peak season with highest prices.
monthly_oui_si.high_hot_sunny_yes: you're looking for maximum sunshine — {sun}h per day on average.
monthly_oui_si.high_hot_sunny_no: you struggle with heat — temperatures regularly exceed 30°C.
monthly_oui_si.high_warm_dry_yes: you want to combine beach, sightseeing and hiking — versatile weather ({tmax}°C, little rain).
monthly_oui_si.high_warm_dry_no: you want to avoid tourist crowds — this is the busiest period.
monthly_oui_si.high_summer_yes: you want long sunny days and outdoor activities.
monthly_oui_si.high_summer_no: you want to avoid summer crowds — this is peak tourist season.
monthly_oui_si.high_shoulder_yes: you want good weather with lower prices than peak season.
monthly_oui_si.high_shoulder_no: you need guaranteed perfect weather — some mixed days are possible.
monthly_oui_si.high_default_yes: you want great weather for all activities.
monthly_oui_si.high_default_no: you're on a tight budget — prices are higher during peak season.
monthly_oui_si.mid_rainy_yes: you're willing to accept showers in exchange for lower prices and fewer tourists.
monthly_oui_si.mid_rainy_no: you're planning 100% outdoor activities — rain is frequent.
monthly_oui_si.mid_cold_yes: you prefer museums and gastronomy — it's cool at {tmax}°C.
monthly_oui_si.mid_cold_no: you're looking for beach weather — it's not the right season.
monthly_oui_si.mid_mild_yes: you want to explore the city on foot without suffering from heat.
monthly_oui_si.mid_mild_no: you're looking for a beach destination — water and air are still cool.
monthly_oui_si.mid_shoulder_yes: you want shoulder-season value — fewer crowds, {tmax}°C.
monthly_oui_si.mid_shoulder_no: you need maximum sunshine — some overcast days are possible.
monthly_oui_si.mid_default_yes: you want to explore cultural sites and local food.
monthly_oui_si.mid_default_no: you need guaranteed sunshine for photos or outdoor activities.
monthly_oui_si.low_tropical_rainy_yes: you want an off-the-beaten-path experience at bargain prices.
monthly_oui_si.low_tropical_rainy_no: you're worried about rain — it's monsoon season with daily showers.
monthly_oui_si.low_cold_winter_yes: you enjoy winter atmosphere and the lowest prices of the year.
monthly_oui_si.low_cold_winter_no: you're looking for sunshine or outdoor activities.
monthly_oui_si.low_rainy_yes: you prefer off-season travel with reduced prices and very few tourists.
monthly_oui_si.low_rainy_no: you want to avoid rain — more than half the days are rainy.
monthly_oui_si.low_default_yes: you want the lowest prices and minimal crowds.
monthly_oui_si.low_default_no: you're looking for summer weather — conditions don't support it.

context_paragraphs.tropical_wet: {month} falls in the wet season in {nom}. Showers are often brief but intense.
context_paragraphs.tropical_dry: {month} is peak dry season in {nom}. The air is warm and humidity more bearable than in the rainy season.
context_paragraphs.summer_hot: In the height of summer, {nom} sees high temperatures ({tmax}°C). Heat is a factor for outdoor activities.
context_paragraphs.summer_warm: Summer in {nom} brings pleasant temperatures ({tmax}°C) and long sunny days ({sun}h of sunshine).
context_paragraphs.winter_cold: Winter in {nom} is cool ({tmax}°C during the day). Days are short ({sun}h of sunshine) but the city reveals a different side.
context_paragraphs.winter_warm: Even in winter, {nom} enjoys {tmax}°C. A real asset for escaping the European cold.
context_paragraphs.spring: Spring marks the start of the good season in {nom}. Temperatures rise ({tmax}°C) and tourists have not yet arrived en masse.
context_paragraphs.autumn_good: Autumn in {nom} is often underrated: {tmax}°C, golden light and declining crowds. An interesting window.
context_paragraphs.autumn_bad: Autumn marks the end of peak season in {nom}. Temperatures drop ({tmax}°C) and rain returns ({rain}% of days).
context_paragraphs.default: In {month}, {nom} sees {tmax}°C during the day with {sun}h of sunshine per day.
context_paragraphs.rain_none: Rain is virtually absent ({rain}% of days) — ideal for planning without a backup.
context_paragraphs.rain_low: Rain risk remains low ({rain}% of days), leaving good room for outdoor activities.
context_paragraphs.rain_mid: Expect rain on {rain}% of days — a light raincoat in the bag is recommended.
context_paragraphs.rain_high: With {rain}% of rainy days, always have indoor alternatives planned.
context_paragraphs.score_top: This is one of the best times of year to visit {nom}.
context_paragraphs.score_good: A good balance between weather and crowds, even if {best_month} ({best_score}/10) remains theoretically better.
context_paragraphs.score_fair: Not the best window, but acceptable if dates are constrained. {best_month} ({best_score}/10) is significantly better if possible.

classements.methodology:
Methodology

Scores computed from 10 years of Open-Meteo archives (ERA5). Each month rated on sunshine (40%), precipitation (30%), thermal comfort (30%). Annual score = average of 12 months. {n} destinations analyzed.

mondial.desc_tpl: {n} destinations ranked using 10 years of weather data. Global top, sunniest, driest.
mondial.hero_sub_tpl: {n} destinations analyzed over 10 years. {top1} leads with {top1_avg}/10.

sections.intro_tpl: Annual score = average of 12 monthly scores (0–10). {n} destinations analyzed.

sections.intro: Average percentage of rainy days per year.

sections.intro: Score = annual average − variance penalty. Higher = more consistent and pleasant weather.

beach.meth:
Beach score methodology

Beach score combines air temperature (25%), sea temperature (25%), precipitation (30%) and sunshine (20%). Sea temperature from Open-Meteo Marine API (2024 data). Only coastal destinations with marine data are included.

caraibes.title_tpl: Best Caribbean weather 2026 — Top Caribbean destinations ranked
caraibes.desc_tpl: {n} Caribbean destinations ranked with 10 years of weather data. Dry season and rainy season.

sections.intro_tpl: {n} Caribbean destinations ranked by annual score.

ski_excellent: Peak ski season in {nom_bare} in {month_lc} — ideal snow and cold conditions.
{month}: prime ski season in {nom_bare}. Optimal conditions.
The best of ski season in {nom_bare} — {month_lc} delivers.
ski_good: Good ski conditions in {nom_bare} in {month_lc} — snowpack generally reliable.
Reliable ski season in {nom_bare} in {month_lc} — winter conditions well established.
ski_poor: Off-season for skiing in {nom_bare} in {month_lc} — aim for {best_ski_month_lc}.
{month} is not ski season in {nom_bare}. Target {best_ski_month_lc}.
Little snow in {nom_bare} in {month_lc} — {best_ski_month_lc} is peak ski.

annual_hero_subs_ski: Best time to ski {nom_bare}: {best_ski_month_lc} offers optimal snow conditions.
Ski at {nom_bare}: {best_ski_month_lc} offers the best snow coverage.

context_paragraphs_ski.ski_peak: Peak ski season {nom_f}: optimal snow cover and fully open slopes. The best time to hit the mountain.
context_paragraphs_ski.ski_good: Good ski conditions {nom_f} with generally reliable snow ({tmax}°C in the valley). Lifts running at full capacity.
context_paragraphs_ski.ski_shoulder: Shoulder ski season {nom_f}: variable snow depending on altitude. Lower runs may be thin with {tmax}°C in the valley.
context_paragraphs_ski.ski_poor: Challenging ski conditions {nom_f} this month ({tmax}°C in the valley). Snow cover is unreliable, with partial closures or late-season conditions.
context_paragraphs_ski.ski_offseason: Off-season for skiing {nom_f} — lifts are closed. Consider hiking, mountain biking or summer activities at altitude.
